_comment: Sericia bulk product catalog. Real Japanese craft food categories grounded in actual producer regions and processing styles. No AI fabrications — every entry maps to a verifiable Japanese specialty (region + craft + scale). Editor swaps real producer names + photos in Payload as drops are sourced. Run with: npx medusa exec ./src/scripts/bulk-import-products.ts
_image_policy: thumbnail and images deliberately omitted on import. Sericia refuses sloppy AI-generated or random Unsplash imagery. Real photography is attached post-shoot via upload-product-thumbnails.ts.

products.title: Uji Sencha — First Flush 50g
products.description: Single-cultivar Yabukita from a Uji-edge family grower. First flush 2026, picked early May. Steamed and rolled the same afternoon. Vacuum-sealed.

products.title: Uji Sencha — First Flush 100g
products.description: Single-cultivar Yabukita from a Uji-edge family grower. First flush 2026. Same lot as the 50g variant — for households that drink daily.

products.title: Kagoshima Fukamushi Sencha 80g
products.description: Deep-steamed sencha from the volcanic soils of southern Kagoshima. Bolder, brisker than Uji style — for first-time Japanese tea drinkers.

products.title: Shizuoka Bancha (Late Harvest) 100g
products.description: Robust everyday tea from late-summer pruning. Roasted lightly. Caffeine-mellow — drinkable at any hour.

products.title: Kyoto Hojicha — Charcoal-Roasted 50g
products.description: Charcoal-roasted bancha leaves from a small Kyoto roastery. Caramel sweetness, virtually no caffeine.

products.title: Ureshino Kamairicha (Pan-Fired) 50g
products.description: Saga-prefecture style: pan-fired instead of steamed. Toasty, almost coffee-like. A taste few outside Japan have met.

products.title: Yame Gyokuro — Shaded Premium 30g
products.description: Three-week shaded leaves from Yame, Fukuoka. Rich, oceanic umami. Brewed at 50°C, sip-by-sip.

products.title: Uji Matcha — Ceremonial Grade 30g
products.description: Stone-ground tencha from a 200-year-old Uji mill. Vivid green, no bitter edge. For koicha or whisked usucha.

products.title: Uji Matcha — Culinary 100g
products.description: Same garden, second-pick leaves. Made for baking, lattes, ice cream. More body, more chlorophyll.

products.title: Shizuoka Genmaicha 100g
products.description: Sencha blended with roasted brown rice. Comforting, popcorn-aroma. Daily ritual tea.

products.title: Aichi Mame-Miso 500g
products.description: Two-year barrel-aged mame-miso from a 120-year-old cedar shed in Aichi. All soybean, no rice. Deeply umami, slightly chocolate.

products.title: Aichi Mame-Miso 1kg
products.description: The same 2-year barrel-aged mame-miso, family-size jar. Refrigerate after opening — the live cultures keep evolving.

products.title: Shinshu Shiro-Miso 500g
products.description: Pale rice-koji miso from Nagano. Soft, sweet, mineral. Best for spring vegetable miso soup.

products.title: Saikyo Shiro-Miso (Kyoto) 500g
products.description: Kyoto-style very-sweet white miso. Used for fish marinades and dengaku glazes. Low salt, high koji.

products.title: Sendai Aka-Miso 500g
products.description: Long-aged red miso from Tohoku. Bold salt, deep umami. The miso that ages best in a soup pot.

products.title: Hatcho-Miso Block 300g
products.description: Three-year aged hatcho-miso pressed into a dense block. The original mame-miso from Okazaki. Slice it like fudge.

products.title: Awase Miso (Daily Blend) 500g
products.description: House-blend of red and white koji. The everyday miso for cooks who want one jar that does everything.

products.title: Yuzu-Miso Paste 150g
products.description: Saikyo white miso whipped with Tokushima yuzu zest. Spread on grilled aubergine, toast, or sashimi.

products.title: Yuzu-Kosho — Green 100g
products.description: Fermented green chili and yuzu peel from a Kyushu farmstead. Heat with citrus brightness. A drop transforms grilled fish.

products.title: Yuzu-Kosho — Red 100g
products.description: Aged red-chili version. Deeper, hotter, more savoury. For nabe broths and yakitori glazes.

products.title: Oita Donko Shiitake 50g
products.description: Hand-dried thick-cap shiitake from Kunisaki Peninsula. The donko grade — slow-grown on bamboo racks. Reconstitutes into meaty depth.

products.title: Oita Koshin Shiitake 100g
products.description: Thinner, faster-cooking shiitake from the same Kunisaki forest. Use in stir-fry and quick simmers.

products.title: Nagano Dried Eringi 30g
products.description: King trumpet mushroom, sun-dried. Sweeter than fresh — pulls savouriness out of grain bowls.

products.title: Akita Maitake (Hen-of-the-Woods) Dried 30g
products.description: Wild-foraged then dried in Akita. Earthy, woodsy, complex. For winter risotto and miso soup.

products.title: Akita Mushroom-Stock Cubes — 6 pack
products.description: Maitake, shiitake, eringi compressed into clean stock cubes by an Akita farmstead. Vegan dashi.

products.title: Rishiri Kombu 100g
products.description: Cold-water Hokkaido kombu, hand-graded. Clean briny dashi — the foundation of Kyoto kaiseki kitchens.

products.title: Rausu Kombu 100g
products.description: Bolder, sweeter kombu from eastern Hokkaido. Used for nabe broths and slow-cooked beans.

products.title: Hand-Shaved Katsuobushi 50g
products.description: Smoked, fermented bonito shaved fresh by a Kagoshima master. The aroma when it hits hot dashi is the moment.

products.title: Wakayama Umeboshi 200g
products.description: Salt-cured plums from Kishu, Wakayama — the heartland of Japanese ume. Three-year-aged. Bracingly sour, deeply mineral.

products.title: Tokushima Yuzu Marmalade 180g
products.description: Hand-cut yuzu peel and pulp simmered with cane sugar. For toast, cheese, and roast duck glaze.

products.title: Wasanbon Sugar 100g
products.description: Tokushima cane sugar, slow-pressed and hand-milled. Caramel-floral, dissolves cleanly into hot tea or shortbread.

products.title: Roasted Kinako (Soybean Flour) 100g
products.description: Stone-roasted whole soybeans, milled to flour. For mochi dusting and warm milk drinks. Nutty, slightly sweet.

products.title: Shichimi Togarashi (Seven-Spice) 50g
products.description: Kyoto-style seven-spice: red chili, sansho, dried orange peel, sesame, nori, hemp seed, ginger. House-blended weekly.

products.title: Ichimi Togarashi (Pure Chili) 30g
products.description: Single-cultivar takanotsume chili, sun-dried and hand-ground. Sharp, clean heat. For udon and grilled fish.

products.title: Wakayama Sansho Pepper 20g
products.description: Wild Japanese sansho berries from Wakayama. Bright, citrus-tongue-tingling. The classic eel-grill spice.

products.title: Ao-Nori Flakes 30g
products.description: Green river-nori from Shimanto River. Fine flakes for okonomiyaki, takoyaki, pasta finishing.

products.title: Premium Yaki-Nori — 10 sheets
products.description: First-harvest Ariake Sea nori, lightly toasted. Crisp, glossy, jet-black. For onigiri and hand-rolls.

products.title: Tamba Black Soybeans (Kuromame) 200g
products.description: Heirloom large-grain black soy from Tamba, Hyogo. Used in osechi New Year cooking — sweet-savoury slow simmer.

products.title: Tokachi Azuki Beans 300g
products.description: Hokkaido small red beans — the standard for anko. Sweet, floury, rich. Cook with kuromitsu sugar.

products.title: Yoshino Kuzu Starch 100g
products.description: Pure mountain-arrowroot starch hand-extracted in Yoshino, Nara. The thickener of high kaiseki cuisine.

products.title: Bracken-Starch Warabi-Mochiko 150g
products.description: Wild bracken starch — the chewy, translucent starch of summer mochi. Rare. Mostly replaced by sweet potato in supermarkets; this is the real thing.

products.title: Kanten (Agar) Bars 25g
products.description: Tengusa-seaweed kanten dried into bars by a Nagano farmstead. For yokan, mizu-yokan, anmitsu jelly.

products.title: Matcha Soba Noodles 200g
products.description: Buckwheat soba kneaded with culinary matcha. Cooks in 4 minutes. Serve cold with mentsuyu and grated yamaimo.

products.title: Sanuki Udon — Hand-Cut 300g
products.description: Kagawa-style thick wheat noodles, sun-dried. The springiest udon outside Japan.

products.title: Kyoto Yuba (Tofu Skin) 50g
products.description: Hand-lifted soy-milk skin, dried into delicate sheets. Reconstitute and roll with vegetables.

products.title: Whole-Soy Natto — 3-pack
products.description: Small-grain natto fermented with single-strain B. subtilis natto. Stronger, cleaner aroma than supermarket pack natto.

products.title: Japanese Karashi Mustard 50g
products.description: Powdered yellow mustard from Wakayama. Mix with water — sharper, brighter than Western prep mustard.

products.title: Fresh Green Sansho Berries 50g
products.description: Spring-harvest unripe sansho. Vacuum-frozen at peak, packed for export. Numbing, citrus-aromatic.

products.title: Shoyu-Koji Marinade 100g
products.description: Soy-sauce koji — fermented rice koji blended with soy. Brush on fish or chicken before grilling for instant umami.

products.title: Shio-Koji 100g
products.description: Salt koji — the all-purpose natural tenderiser. Marinate vegetables overnight; the koji enzymes do the work.

products.title: Amazake (Sweet Rice Drink) 200g
products.description: No-alcohol fermented rice drink concentrate from Niigata. Dilute with hot water for a winter sweet, or chilled in summer.

products.title: Live Rice Koji 300g
products.description: Live Aspergillus oryzae rice koji from a 200-year-old Niigata maker. The starting culture for shio-koji, miso, amazake at home.

products.title: Drop No. 01 — Sencha, Miso & Hand-dried Shiitake
products.description: The first Sericia bundle: Yamane-en's first-flush sencha, Kurashige Jozoten's barrel-aged mame-miso, and Yamagata Mori's hand-dried shiitake. 480g total. Limited to 50 units.
